projects.title: CareerPulse AI — Career Intelligence Engine
projects.description: A backend-driven system that matches user skills with real-time job listings and ranks them using a custom scoring engine. Key highlights: Real-time job fetching via API, skill-based job ranking, missing skill detection, and modular backend architecture.

projects.title: Grocery Expense Tracker Application
projects.description: Designed and developed a backend-driven application with database integration to manage and track user expenses efficiently. Implemented CRUD operations, optimized SQL queries, and structured relational database schema for performance and scalability. Applied modular coding practices and input validation to ensure data integrity and system reliability. Integrated authentication and session handling for secure user access.

projects.title: Automated Road Extraction using U-Net
projects.description: Developed a deep learning model using U-Net architecture for automated road detection from satellite images. Implemented data pre-processing, model training, and evaluation pipeline using Python and TensorFlow/PyTorch. Optimized model performance through hyperparameter tuning and validation techniques.
